## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Insert USB device '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Arch Linux, Ubuntu 24.04]
- riskie version: [e.g., 0.3.0]
- Installation method: [e.g., AUR, from source, binary]
- Desktop environment: [e.g., i3, Hyprland, Sway, GNOME]
- System tray: [e.g., i3bar, waybar, eww]

## Device Information (if applicable)

- Device type: [e.g., USB flash drive, SD card, encrypted LUKS drive]
- Filesystem: [e.g., ext4, vfat, ntfs, LUKS]
- Device path (if known): [e.g., /dev/sdb1]
